title: taraxacum horridifrons
intro: Taraxacum horridifrons, also known as the rough-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum horridifrons include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, tinctures, and extracts of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
